data.title: Serverless Microservices
data.description: Uses AWS Lambda to handle business logic in isolated units.

data.title: Global Content Delivery Network
data.description: Content is delivered using a distributed network of edge locations.

data.title: Relational Database Management
data.description: Utilizes distributed databases for scalable data storage.

data.title: Service-Oriented Architecture
data.description: Integrates various services to perform distinct functions.

data.title: Redundant Data Backup
data.description: Implements failover systems to prevent data loss.
